title: Math Teacher (Grades 3, 4 & 6)
summary: Teach math in small classes for grades 3, 4, and 6 using Bluebonnet/Eureka Math and story problems; help students build problem-solving and reasoning skills with manipulatives, visuals, and discussion.
required_credentials: Texas teaching certificate covering grades 3-6 mathematics (e.g., Core Subjects EC-6 or Mathematics 4-8)
preferred_experience: Evidence of student success (achievement data, portfolios)
responsibilities: Teach math for grades 3, 4, and 6 using the adopted curricula.
Use manipulatives, visuals, and discussion to make math meaningful.
Build strong problem-solving and reasoning skills.
Receive weekly coaching and plan collaboratively.
rubric_hints: Texas certification covering grades 3-6 math (Core Subjects EC-6 or Mathematics 4-8)
Math teaching experience and student outcomes
